---
title: "Open Data Regional"
description: "Processing and visualization of open government and environmental datasets at regional scale."
image: thumbnail.jpg
categories: [R, Open Data, Geospatial]
---

## About

A toolset for accessing, harmonizing, and visualizing open environmental and administrative datasets. Focuses on making regional data usable for research and policy — with automated update pipelines and interactive outputs.

## Stack

[R]{.badge-skill} [Python]{.badge-skill} [QGIS]{.badge-skill} [Open Data]{.badge-skill}
